title: satureja alpina
intro: Satureja alpina, also known as Alpine Savory or Mountain Savory, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Central Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja alpina include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Satureja alpina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in cooking to add flavor to various dishes.
